title: Slovakian Butter Casserole
description: A crowd-pleasing Slovakian dish featuring melted butter, deglazed fond, and a crumbly texture.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a fine milled flour for best results

ingredients.name: granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: white sugar for the best flavor

ingredients.name: ground cinnamon
ingredients.notes: optional, but adds a nice depth of flavor

ingredients.name: heavy cream
ingredients.notes: adds moisture and richness to the casserole

ingredients.name: sour cream
ingredients.notes: adds a tangy flavor and creamy texture

ingredients.name: vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: optional, but adds a nice flavor

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and cinnamon until well combined.
Add the softened butter to the dry ingredients and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Press the mixture evenly into the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, sour cream, and vanilla extract until smooth.
Pour the wet ingredients over the crust and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is set.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
